goal: trace_measurable[T](m, a, v) = is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m, a, v.intersection(a))

p.c: function[T0](x0: SigmaAlgebra[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: Set[T0]) { is_measurable_in_subspace[T0](x0, x1, x2 ∩ x1) = trace_measurable[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[T](m, a, v)
function[T0](x0: SigmaAlgebra[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: Set[T0]) { is_measurable_in_subspace[T0](x0, x1, x2 ∩ x1) = trace_measurable[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[T](m1, a, u)

goal: exists(k0: Set[T]) { m1.is_measurable(k0) and u.intersection(a) = k0.intersection(a) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: SigmaAlgebra[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: Set[T0]) { exists(k0: Set[T0]) { x0.is_measurable(k0) and k0 ∩ x1 = x2 } = is_measurable_in_subspace[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[T](m1, a, u ∩ a)
not exists(k0: Set[T]) { m1.is_measurable(k0) and k0 ∩ a = u ∩ a } or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m1, a, u ∩ a)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (m1.is_measurable(x0) and x0 ∩ a = u ∩ a) or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m1, a, u ∩ a) })
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { u ∩ a != x0 ∩ a or not m1.is_measurable(x0) or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m1, a, u ∩ a) })
not m1.is_measurable(u) or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m1, a, u ∩ a)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not m1.is_measurable(x0) or u != x0 or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m1, a, u ∩ a) })

goal: sigma_algebra_le[T](m1, m2) = forall(x0: Set[T]) { m1.is_measurable(x0) implies m2.is_measurable(x0) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: SigmaAlgebra[T0], x1: SigmaAlgebra[T0]) { forall(x2: Set[T0]) { not x0.is_measurable(x2) or x1.is_measurable(x2) } = sigma_algebra_le[T0](x0, x1) }[T](m1, m2)
not sigma_algebra_le[T](m1, m2) or forall(x0: Set[T]) { not m1.is_measurable(x0) or m2.is_measurable(x0) } = true
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (m1.is_measurable(x0) and not m2.is_measurable(x0)) or not sigma_algebra_le[T](m1, m2) })
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (m1.is_measurable(x0) and not m2.is_measurable(x0)) })
not forall(x0: Set[T]) { not m1.is_measurable(x0) or m2.is_measurable(x0) } or sigma_algebra_le[T](m1, m2)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not m1.is_measurable(x0) or m2.is_measurable(x0) } = true)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (m1.is_measurable(x0) and not m2.is_measurable(x0)) })
function(x0: Set[T]) { not (m1.is_measurable(x0) and not m2.is_measurable(x0)) }(v)
not m1.is_measurable(v) or m2.is_measurable(v)

goal: exists(k0: Set[T]) { m2.is_measurable(k0) and u.intersection(a) = k0.intersection(a) }

p.c: function(x0: Set[T]) { not (m2.is_measurable(x0) and x0 ∩ a = u ∩ a) }(v)
v ∩ a != u ∩ a or not m2.is_measurable(v)
not m2.is_measurable(v) or v != u
exists(k0: Set[T]) { m2.is_measurable(k0) and k0 ∩ a = u ∩ a }
let w0: Set[T] satisfy { m2.is_measurable(w0) and u ∩ a = w0 ∩ a }
function[T0](x0: SigmaAlgebra[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: Set[T0]) { exists(k0: Set[T0]) { x0.is_measurable(k0) and k0 ∩ x1 = x2 } = is_measurable_in_subspace[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[T](m2, a, u ∩ a)
not exists(k0: Set[T]) { m2.is_measurable(k0) and k0 ∩ a = u ∩ a } or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m2, a, u ∩ a)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (m2.is_measurable(x0) and x0 ∩ a = u ∩ a) or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m2, a, u ∩ a) })
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { u ∩ a != x0 ∩ a or not m2.is_measurable(x0) or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m2, a, u ∩ a) })
not m2.is_measurable(u) or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m2, a, u ∩ a)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not m2.is_measurable(x0) or u != x0 or is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m2, a, u ∩ a) })

goal: trace_measurable[T](m2, a, u) = is_measurable_in_subspace[T](m2, a, u.intersection(a))

p.c: function[T0](x0: SigmaAlgebra[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: Set[T0]) { is_measurable_in_subspace[T0](x0, x1, x2 ∩ x1) = trace_measurable[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[T](m2, a, u)

function[T0](x0: SigmaAlgebra[T0], x1: SigmaAlgebra[T0]) { forall(x2: Set[T0]) { not x0.is_measurable(x2) or x1.is_measurable(x2) } = sigma_algebra_le[T0](x0, x1) }[T](trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a), trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a))

not sigma_algebra_le[T](trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a), trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a)) or forall(x0: Set[T]) { not trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a).is_measurable(x0) or trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a).is_measurable(x0) } = true

(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a).is_measurable(x0) and not trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a).is_measurable(x0)) or not sigma_algebra_le[T](trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a), trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a)) })
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a).is_measurable(x0) and not trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a).is_measurable(x0)) })

(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not sigma_algebra_le[T](trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a), trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a)) or not trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a).is_measurable(x0) or trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a).is_measurable(x0) })
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a).is_measurable(x0) or trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a).is_measurable(x0) })

not forall(x0: Set[T]) { not trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a).is_measurable(x0) or trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a).is_measurable(x0) } or sigma_algebra_le[T](trace_sigma_algebra[T](m1, a), trace_sigma_algebra[T](m2, a))

goal: trace_generator[T](a, g)(u) = exists(k0: Set[T]) { g(k0) and u = k0.intersection(a) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Bool, x1: Set[T0], x2: Set[T0]) { exists(k0: Set[T0]) { x0(k0) and k0 ∩ x1 = x2 } = trace_generator[T0](x1, x0, x2) }[T](g, a, u)
not exists(k0: Set[T]) { g(k0) and k0 ∩ a = u } or trace_generator[T](a, g, u)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (g(x0) and x0 ∩ a = u) or trace_generator[T](a, g, u) })

goal: exists(k0: Set[T]) { g(k0) and u = k0.intersection(a) }
exists(k0: Set[T]) { g(k0) and u = k0.intersection(a) }

p.c: exists(k0: Set[T]) { trace_generator[T](a, g, k0) and not trace_sigma_algebra[T](generated_sigma_algebra[T](g), a).is_measurable(k0) }
let w0: Set[T] satisfy { trace_generator[T](a, g, w0) and not trace_sigma_algebra[T](generated_sigma_algebra[T](g), a).is_measurable(w0) }
trace_generator[T](a, g, w0)
not trace_sigma_algebra[T](generated_sigma_algebra[T](g), a).is_measurable(w0)
function(x0: Set[T]) { not trace_generator[T](a, g, x0) or trace_sigma_algebra[T](generated_sigma_algebra[T](g), a).is_measurable(x0) }(w0)
exists(k0: Set[T]) { trace_generator[T](a, g, k0) and not trace_sigma_algebra[T](generated_sigma_algebra[T](g), a).is_measurable(k0) }
let w0: Set[T] satisfy { trace_generator[T](a, g, w0) and not trace_sigma_algebra[T](generated_sigma_algebra[T](g), a).is_measurable(w0) }
trace_generator[T](a, g, w0)
not trace_sigma_algebra[T](generated_sigma_algebra[T](g), a).is_measurable(w0)
function(x0: Set[T]) { not trace_generator[T](a, g, x0) or trace_sigma_algebra[T](generated_sigma_algebra[T](g), a).is_measurable(x0) }(w0)
